word: G2163 - εὔφημος - eúphēmos - yoo'-fay-mos - Of good report

sections.paragraph:
- Original: εὔφημος

- Transliteration: Euphemos

- Phonetic: yoo'-fay-mos

- Definition:

1. sounding well

2. uttering words of good omen, speaking auspiciously

- Origin: from G2095 and G5345

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G2095 and G5345; well spoken of that is reputable: - of good report.
